If SLOT-3 has a task assigned to s1-worker-3: read the target file, make the change surgically using find-and-replace, verify the file, update SLOT-3 status to done. If the change is ONLY writing or adding to Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\ai\ and no source files were modified, run: git -C Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO add ai/ && git -C Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO commit -m docs: s1-worker-3 update. If SLOT-3 is idle do nothing. One file. One change.
Current time: Tuesday, March 3rd, 2026 — 11:25 PM (America/Los_Angeles)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
